settings.texture_body: A fluid, water-thin texture that sinks into skin within seconds. No white cast, no tackiness — just clinical-grade actives delivered precisely where skin needs them.
settings.texture_layering: Compatible with all Velour Skin formulas

settings.name: Hyaluronic Acid
settings.detail: Holds up to 1,000× its weight in water. Multi-weight formula for surface and deeper skin layers.

settings.name: Niacinamide
settings.detail: Regulates sebum, minimises pores, and fades pigmentation at clinical concentration.

settings.name: Ceramide NP
settings.detail: Lipids identical to those found in healthy skin. Seals moisture and strengthens the skin barrier.

settings.name: Centella Asiatica
settings.detail: Madecassoside and asiaticoside reduce redness and support wound healing at cellular level.

settings.title: Apply after cleansing
settings.detail: Begin with clean, dry or slightly damp skin

settings.title: Use 2–3 drops
settings.detail: Warm between fingertips and press gently into skin

settings.title: Follow with cream
settings.detail: Seal active ingredients in with a barrier moisturiser

settings.title: Apply SPF in the morning
settings.detail: Always finish your AM routine with broad-spectrum SPF 30+

settings.question: How do I layer this with other serums?
settings.answer: Apply lighter, water-based serums first, followed by thicker textures. If using multiple Velour Skin serums, allow 60 seconds between each for full absorption.

settings.question: Can I use this morning and evening?
settings.answer: Yes — this formula is designed for AM and PM use. Always finish your morning routine with a broad-spectrum SPF 30+.

settings.question: Is this suitable for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: The formula is designed with sensitivity in mind. We recommend a 24-hour patch test on the inner forearm before full facial use. Discontinue if redness or irritation occurs.

settings.question: Is this safe to use during pregnancy?
settings.answer: We recommend consulting your healthcare provider or midwife before introducing new products during pregnancy or while breastfeeding.

settings.question: How should I patch test?
settings.answer: Apply a small amount to the inner forearm or behind the ear. Leave unwashed for 24 hours. If no reaction occurs, proceed with regular use.

settings.question: How long will a 30ml bottle last?
settings.answer: Using 2–3 drops twice daily, a 30ml bottle typically lasts 6–8 weeks with consistent use.
